reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

This is double the money of just buying the toothbrush and paste separately. I wish I read more reviews. DONT BUY.

Its spiral bristles help hard-to-reach areas to remove food, stains, and plaque while polishing and whitening your teeth in every clean. Our Ergo Dex handles are designed for a comfortable grip and control while using. It is recommended to change your toothbrush every 3 months or as needed for good oral hygiene.

So many newer toothbrushes have tiny heads, and I wasn't getting my teeth clean with them, including with an electric toothbrush. My teeth are much cleaner and whiter after less than a month using it. I see some plaque disappearing as well.

title: Bitvae Smart S3 Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 180-Day Battery Life Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush with Pressure Sensor, Champagne Gold
features: 【Provides Diamond Cleaning】Bitvae Smart S3 Rechargeable sonic toothbrush features an industry-leading ultrasonic motor that generates 40,000RPM. It provides superior cleaning even in hard-to-reach areas of your mouth. If you are looking for a professional cleaning toothbrush, this is the one!

【Unique Bristle Design to Prevent Tooth Decay】The unique bristle design of the sonic cleaning brush sets it apart from others. Users can get a more thorough dental cleaning experience than with a standard toothbrush. Effectively reduces tartar buildup and helps prevent tooth decay or cavities.

【Personalize Your Brushing】Here are 5 modes & 3 intensities on our sonic toothbrush (9 adjustable intensities on the app) for various gum care needs. This IPX7 waterproof toothbrush has a built-in 2mins timer that pulses every 30secs to remind you to switch to the next quadrant of the mouth.

【180-Day Battery Life】Bitvae S3 long-lasting battery toothbrush for adults features a 4-hour quick-charge battery that lasts up to 180 days, making it perfect for travel and far outperforming other toothbrushes on the market. Say goodbye to the bulky charging base with our USB Type-C cable.

【Pressure sensor protects teeth and gums】 Brushing too hard can damage tooth enamel, increase sensitivity and lead to gum recession. Our electronic toothbrush with pressure indicator will light up RED to remind you to reduce the pressure to protect your teeth and gums.

【"iSpruz" Smart Oral Care App】This Smart Bluetooth Toothbrush is paired with the app to track and store data on brushing time, coverage, uniformity and excess pressure. You can also change various settings through the app (such as brushing modes, intensities, and brushing time).

【Toothbrush Holder & Travel Case Included】The travel-friendly electric toothbrush includes a travel case that allows users to take the toothbrush anywhere. It also includes a toothbrush/phone holder that helps keep your toothbrush clean at all times. Great all round gift for yourself or your family.
【Package Includes】1 Bitvae S3 Toothbrush Handle, 4 Toothbrush Heads, 4 Toothbrush Covers, 1 Travel Case, 1 Toothbrush/Phone Holder, 1 USB Cable (Adaptor not Included), and 1 User Manual.
【1 Year Warranty】If you have any question, please contact bitvae fast and friendly customer service team, we will do our best to sovle any problem.

reviews.title: This toothbrush is amazing!
reviews.text: I was surprised by how well this smart electric toothbrush works. The toothbrush connected via Bluetooth to the iSpruz app without any problems. This is a great tool to improve your brushing skills! My teeth feel amazing after each brush. Great affordable toothbrush. Comes with a nice travel case.

reviews.title: Impressive amount of features and app allows customization and guidance for optimal brushing
reviews.text:
I got this to replace an old electric toothbrush, and I'm blown away at how technology has transformed tooth brushing! There are so many customizable features with this toothbrush, and the app will tell you if you're applying too much pressure, missing areas, or not spending enough time brushing.

Here are some of the pleasant surprises:

> Comes with a really nice travel case
> includes a special super soft brush head for gum massage
> The app is AMAZING. It's quick and easy to download and has lots of information and options to adjust the toothbrush operation
> Instruction pamphlet is well written and covers everything you need to know

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

reviews.title: Good value for the money, wish it pulsated a little stronger. Terrible app.
reviews.text: For the money this might be the best budget friendly electric toothbrush on Amazon in my opinion. Stay away from the app. It is terribly designed and doesn't consistently sync. The pulses are stronger than others in the same price class, but it isn't quite strong enough to give my mouth a feeling in deep cleaning.

reviews.title: Way too small…
reviews.text: Way smaller than I had hoped for. Tiny toothbrushes the toothbrushes looks like they’ve been cut in half. That would have been fine but the toothbrush head is so tiny, I appreciate that these are compostable but I just feel like this could have been done better. The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! I won’t use the pills, I just bought these for the compostable toothbrushes, so I can’t really comment on those.

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

title: Philips Sonicare ProtectiveClean 5300 Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush, Black, HX6423/34

Our BrushSync technology tracks how long you have been using your Optimal Gum Care brush head and how hard you have been brushing. Your electric toothbrush will beep to inform you when to replace your brush head. The easy-start feature slowly increases the power of the brush as you get used to the Sonicare experience and the SmarTimer encourages a full 2 minute brushing time as recommended by your dental professional. reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Love this toothbrush

reviews.title: Hate the feeling
reviews.text:
Picked this up alongside an OralB toothbrush to compare and...I don't understand why people like the Sonicare toothbrushes.

I've seen people say that you have to get used to the feeling, but it just feels awful. Not even necessarily the regular use, but if you accidentally touch the plastic to your teeth you get a horrible vibration feeling that shoots through your jaw/entire head. It also feels awful if you touch it on your lips on accident, too.

This alone made me return it in favor of the Oral B.

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: Fresh breath minus harsh chemicals
reviews.text: I always enjoy a natural product and this right here does the job

reviews.title: Great toothpaste!
reviews.text:
I've used the anise and cinnamon flavors many times. I don't like mint toothpaste that overpowers. This one is more subtle, really impressed.

I've used this product for many years. Took a few brushes to get used to the salty baking powder taste, but it's been smooth sailing ever since... And no cavities!

reviews.title: Tooth Powder
reviews.text: This product is the bomb!  Been using it for years and always get compliments on how nice and white my teeth are.  The container seems to last forever so that compensates for the slightly high price for a toothpaste.  Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

reviews.title: Best Tooth Powder

⏰BUILDS HEALTHY BRUSHING HABITS: Based on the professional advice of brushing teeth twice a day for two minutes each time, COSLUS toothbrush sets the smart timer to 2min and lightly vibrates every 30 seconds to remind child to switch to another part of the teeth, thoroughly clean their oral, and develop correct habits. Meanwhile, our toothbrush has 3 cleaning modes with memory function: deep clean, soft clean and massage, you can choose the right mode according to your child's needs

✔️GENTLE & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Created in partnership with thousands of Professionals, COSLUS kids toothbrush is safe, effective and gentle on incoming teeth and sensitive gums. Ultra-low vibration, children will not feel numb when using. What's more, this toothbrush vibrates up to 31000 times/min, 100% more powerful than ordinary electric toothbrushes. 🎁Designed For Kids' Oral Development: The unique caterpillar-shaped silicone handle is comfortable and non-slip, more suitable for children's small hands. And widened tongue brush head is made of food-grade silicone to massage kids' tongue while cleaning effectively. In addition, the lock-type design can better prevent brush head from falling off, allowing kids to brush more safely independently. With IPX7 waterproof design, your children can directly rinse and soak it with water after brushing

⚡90 Days Long Endurance: This rechargeable kids electric toothbrush lasts up to 90 days after 2.5 hours of wireless charging, more convenient and faster. It highly reduces the hassle of frequent charging and battery replacement, easy to use at home and on the go. In addition, the average lifespan of our electric toothbrush is approximately 3 years, which is double the lifespan compared to other electric toothbrush

Tips: It is recommended to replace the brush head every three months. ---You can check the related information on the box, get 3 replacement brush heads --- Or buy other brush head sets at the COSLUS store to better experience this electric toothbrush

reviews.title: Worth every cent

reviews.title: 8 Heads more important than you might think
reviews.text:
I've been trying a bunch of similar toothbrushes lately. First off, most of the brands do not have interchangeable heads, so many of these will end up getting thrown out once the heads are used. For that reason, getting 8 heads with this is an important feature, because at least for the current price, you could hardly buy 8 disposable brushes.

One of the things I like about some others is when they have an induction charger that also acts like a little dock (of those, I prefer the ones with a USB plug rather than an AC plug). Those normally charge a premium, but this one is inexpensive, so at least they have that going for it. It's not like you have to charge it often (although definitely more than once a year), but laying a toothbrush down to plug it in is cumbersome, and it takes a while to charge.

I don't want or need the 30/120 second timers, but every single one I've ever seen (of the "sonic" type) has had that, so how can I complain? I end up brushing for 6-10 minutes most of the time.

Not a bad version of the less expensive off-brand options, but I don't think anyone can predict the future as to if and for how long replacement heads will be available.

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.
